Our ExpertiseWe are a specialized service provider for custom industrial machine vision solutions with a focusonHALCON. Since 2015, we have been supporting companies as a reliable developmentpartner – from concept and implementation to long-term maintenance.Based in Munich, we work with clients in Germany, across the EU,and worldwide – including the USA, Canada,United Kingdom, Chile, and Australia. Our expertise with HALCONgoes back to 2004. | Heindl Solutions | Heindl Solutions ↓ Skip to main content Heindl Solutions Home Blog Services Services Trainings Qualifications Projects  || hs projects | Projects: Our projects · Heindl Solutions | 49 projects, 39customersWe have many satisfied customers across a wide range of industries who benefit from professional industrial imageprocessing.
